description: Case style: Analogue watch with stainless steel round caseDial style: Black dial with textured patterns, metallic hands with white accents, circular display of minute markings on the dial and branding on the 60 minute markFeatures: Three chronograph displays on the dial for date, minutes and seconds, date aperture on the 20 minute mark and screws to reset timeStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp closureWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: 2 years international warrantyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
